description_long: This hammer features a robust, double-bladed head with a gear-like central motif, giving it a striking, almost fantasy-inspired appearance. The head is symmetrical, with two wide, angular blades extending outward, each edged with a dark metallic finish and accented by deep red highlights. The handle is segmented, primarily cylindrical, and reinforced with metallic bands and textured grips, suggesting both durability and comfort for heavy-duty use. The lower end of the handle is capped with a spiked, star-shaped pommel, adding both visual interest and potential secondary functionality. A small loop or ring is attached near the head, possibly for hanging or attaching a lanyard. The overall color palette is dominated by dark metallic tones, deep reds, and muted browns, giving the hammer a rugged, industrial look suitable for urban or fantasy settings.
description: A double-bladed, gear-themed hammer with a segmented, reinforced handle and spiked pommel, featuring dark metallic and red accents. Its design is both functional and visually striking, with industrial and fantasy elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical double-bladed head, central gear motif, and full handle with spiked pommel.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile of the blades and the rectangular cross-section of the head, with less detail visible on the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the double-bladed head and gear motif, with handle and pommel visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thinness of the head and the handle's side profile.
attribute_handle_type: Segmented, straight handle with metallic bands and textured rubberized grip, cylindrical in shape with ergonomic enhancements for secure handling.
attribute_head_type: Double-bladed, symmetrical hammer head with a central gear motif, wide angular blades, and a spiked star-shaped pommel; specialized fantasy/industrial design.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: Small loop or ring near the head
